name: Spicy Blackened Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place an iron skillet on a grill set over high heat and preheat for 15 minutes.
2. Mix salt, white pepper, ground fennel, black pepper, garlic powder, dry mustard, and cayenne in a bowl.
3. Prepare the burgers according to their recipe up through forming the patties.
4. Pat a thin layer of the spice mixture on the surface of each burger.
5. Spray the burgers with vegetable spray and cook them in the skillet for 4 minutes per side.
6. Remove from heat. Transfer burgers to buns.
7. Add water and Worcestershire sauce to the pan and stir to loosen bits stuck to the pan.
8. Spoon the liquid over the burgers.
